column3:
Enables Grid-based parking layout.

Configuration:
- enableGridFloorPlan=true  & autoSlotAllocate=false → Grid-based parking
- enableGridFloorPlan=false & autoSlotAllocate=true  → Auto Slot Allocation

Note: Must be configured along with autoSlotAllocate to determine parking mode.
